Article.ArticleTitle: Improvements in glucose metabolism after high-, but not low-, volume strength exercise in individuals with obesity are associated with baseline insulin resistance: a secondary analysis from a randomized clinical trial.

AffiliationInfo.Affiliation: Graduate Program in Health Sciences, Federal University of the Jequitinhonha and Mucuri Valleys, Diamantina, Minas Gerais, Brazil.
